hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of Be a Millionaire Day, Hairspray is a fun and upbeat film that features a dance competition with a grand prize of $1,000, which, adjusted for inflation, was a significant amount of money for the characters and would make them feel like millionaires.
hero.blurb: With its catchy musical numbers and energetic performances, Hairspray is a fun and entertaining film that will keep you smiling. The movie's lighthearted and comedic tone makes it a great choice for a pick-me-up.

released.title: Shrek
released.reason: Released today in 2001, Shrek is a groundbreaking animated film that has become a beloved classic, still entertaining audiences with its witty humor and lovable characters.
released.blurb: Shrek is a hilarious and irreverent film that pokes fun at traditional fairy tales, with a talented voice cast and impressive animation. The movie's clever writing and pop culture references make it a must-see for both kids and adults.

birthday.title: Chaplin
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to John Nash is not the connection, rather Happy birthday to Timothy Dalton (born May 20, 1946), Chaplin is a biographical drama film starring Robert Downey Jr. as the titular character, but Timothy Dalton was considered for the role and is an accomplished actor in his own right.
birthday.blurb: Chaplin is a fascinating film that explores the life and career of the legendary comedian and filmmaker Charlie Chaplin. With its strong performances and engaging storyline, the film is a compelling tribute to a Hollywood icon.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a mind-bogglingly bad action movie with a convoluted plot and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a prime candidate for a dumpster dive.
awful.blurb: This movie is a mess of poorly choreographed fight scenes and ridiculous plot twists, making it a hilarious example of how not to make an action film. With its low IMDb rating, it's a guaranteed laugh, but not in a good way.
